evals.prompt: 我们团队有 10 个人，每次开会总是一半人在说话，另一半人从不发言。分配任务时，总是那几个人在干活，其他人能躲就躲。年底考核发现，80% 的成果来自 20% 的人。我想知道这是为什么，怎么改变？
evals.expected_output: Model analysis recommending collective action model or power-law distribution, analyzing the free-rider problem and suggesting solutions
expectations: Recommends at least one relevant model from the book
Explains why the model fits the problem
Applies the model framework to analyze the situation step by step
Provides actionable suggestions based on the analysis

evals.prompt: 我在考虑要不要从大厂出来做一个新的 AI 笔记产品。现在笔记市场已经很拥挤了，印象笔记、Notion、Obsidian、飞书文档都已经有很强的用户基础。我担心即使产品做得更好，也很难让用户迁移过来。
evals.expected_output: Model analysis recommending path dependence model, potentially with threshold model or rugged-landscape as supplementary perspective
expectations: Recommends at least one relevant model from the book
Explains why the model fits the problem
Applies the model framework to analyze the situation
Discusses switching costs and lock-in effects
Provides strategic analysis based on the model

evals.prompt: 公司内部最近在推一个跨部门协作平台，但推广效果很差。最开始只有技术部在用，后来市场部也加入了，但其他部门始终不动。我注意到当某个部门的使用率达到 40% 左右时，就会突然加速推广到整个部门。为什么会出现这个现象？怎么利用这个规律？
evals.expected_output: Model analysis recommending threshold models with feedbacks, analyzing tipping points and cascade effects
expectations: Recommends threshold model as the primary model
Explains the tipping point concept (40% threshold observation)
Applies the model to analyze the adoption dynamics
Provides strategies to accelerate cross-department adoption
